title: Tax return
description: Instruction on how to complete each question in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Completing individual information on your tax return 2012
child_links.description: Helps you to accurately complete individual information in your tax return and avoid delays in processing.

child_links.title: Income questions 1-12
child_links.description: How to complete income questions 1 to 12 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Deduction questions D1-D10
child_links.description: How to complete deduction questions D1 to D10 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Losses question L1
child_links.description: How to complete the losses question L1 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Tax offset questions T1-T6
child_links.description: How to complete the tax offset questions T1 to T6 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Medicare levy questions M1-M2
child_links.description: How to complete the Medicare levy questions M1 and M2 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Private health insurance policy details 2012
child_links.description: Complete this question if you were covered by private health insurance or paid for a dependant-person-only policy.

child_links.title: Flood levy exemption
child_links.description: Complete this item on your tax return if you are eligible to claim an exemption from paying the flood levy.

child_links.title: Adjustment questions A1-A3
child_links.description: How to complete the adjustment questions A1 to A3 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Income test questions IT1-IT7
child_links.description: How to complete the income test questions IT1 to IT7 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Spouse details - married or de facto 2012
child_links.description: Complete this question if you had a spouse during 2011-12.

child_links.title: Adjusted taxable income (ATI) for you and your dependants 2012
child_links.description: Work out your adjusted taxable income and if you're eligible for certain tax offsets.
